results.rendered_html:
avayavin a. [avayavaḥ kāraṇatvenāstyasya ini] Having limbs, having portions or subdivisions (as a whole); avayavinā saha pūrvādayaḥ samasyaṃte  P. II. 2. 1.   Sk. 
— m. (vī)
1 A whole, any substance formed of several constituents; nanu avayavini kiṃ mānaṃ Sid. Mukt.
2 A syllogism, or any logical argument.
